closureNotes.overrideRecord: Three substrate-vs-spec drift items resolved at EB execution time per memory #15 documented-override-not-compliance discipline (drifts captured here rather than silently bypassed; canonical paths used in execution; spec retained as authored-time artifact). (1) Intake stage service paths — spec scope said apps/api-gateway/src/services/intake/stage4-ifc.service.ts, stage5-takt.service.ts, stage6-decision.service.ts, voxel-groups-materializer.service.ts. Substrate at EB main b9b4141511f806b6746cc8bba0192253b3c06793 confirmed apps/api-gateway/src/intake/stages/stage-4-ifc.ts canonical layout (no /services/ sub-path; suffix .ts not .service.ts). Tarball wrote at substrate-confirmed apps/api-gateway/src/intake/stages/stage-4b-voxel-groups.ts and apps/api-gateway/src/intake/voxel-groups-materializer.ts. Stage 5/6 unmodified — spec called for tie-ins but substrate showed stage hooks already covered the materialization invocation path via Stage 4b. (2) ROS 2 launch file format — spec scope said infrastructure/uro-sim/colcon_ws/src/luhtech_uro_sim/launch/uro_sim.launch.py. Substrate confirmed existing launch file is XML (simulators.launch.xml). Tarball patched the .xml via apply.sh PHASE 4 (appended <node> element before </launch>) rather than authoring a new .py launch file. (3) Maple Ridge bundle version — spec title said 'Maple Ridge bundle v1.0.0' and outputs OUT-5 said 'authoring v1.0.0'. Substrate confirmed bundle already exists at v1.1.0 (post-2026-06-03 infra-hygiene arc).
